name: COLORdash Batten H12X IP
comment: COLORdash Batten H12X IP RGBWAUV linear wash with 12 individually-controllable hex-colored LEDs efficiently delivers a broad palette of subtle to saturated color with beautiful precision, weighing in under 18 lbs while delivering over 4,700 lumens of output. Flawlessly smooth 16-bit fades with four selectable dimming curves. Flicker-free output with multiple PWM frequencies. Maintains an even pixel pitch for perfect pixel mapped looks when used in multiples. Setup is easy with hanging brackets that double as floor stands. With RDM to remotely choose its DMX personality and an OLED display to easily read its onboard menu, COLORdash Batten H12X IP offers convenient operation and excellent performance as an IP65-rated all-weather die-cast workhorse at home in any environment, in the rig or on the floor, live or on camera, indoor or out.
